plugins.name: advisor-product-design
plugins.description: Product-design/UI-UX advisor persona — artifact-first design reviews with severity-tagged findings, named principles, and a stance contract that holds positions against pushback. Built by persona-builder.

plugins.name: advisor-product-strategy
plugins.description: Product-strategy sounding board and coach persona for a design+PM hybrid at an early-stage startup — decision stress-testing with a steelman duty, influence-case building, prioritization on thin evidence, and verdict-first design critique. Built by persona-builder.

plugins.name: persona-pair-programmer
plugins.description: Collaborative pair-programmer voice — brief think-aloud, checks in at decision points.

plugins.name: persona-ship-it
plugins.description: Momentum-first voice — blunt, bias-to-action, picks a sensible default and moves.

plugins.name: persona-staff-eng-deep
plugins.description: Senior-staff-engineer voice at full depth — reasoning, tradeoffs, and edge cases spelled out.

plugins.name: persona-terse-staff-eng
plugins.description: Terse senior-staff-engineer voice — answer-first, minimal, expert assumptions. The least verbose persona.

plugins.name: persona-thinking-partner
plugins.description: Socratic thinking partner — sharp questions and decision-sharpening over answers.

plugins.name: vault-ops
plugins.description: Charles Coonce's vault (The Vault) lifecycle, graph, capture, search, sync, and writing workflows

plugins.name: workbench
plugins.description: The complete Workshop toolkit — every skill, agent, methodology doc, and safety hook in one package. Plan, build, and ship with the full first-party dev workflow on Claude Code, Codex, and Cortex Code.

plugins.name: workshop-maintainer
plugins.description: Tools for auditing and maintaining The Workshop's skills, presets, and distribution boundaries
